manifest.name: Last Position

name: Last Position

releases.author: Saktawdi
releases.description:
修复了可能导致Obsidian启动慢的问题，来自[issue #3 ](https://github.com/Saktawdi/obsidian-last-position/issues/3)

感谢所有提供反馈的用户，帮助我们改进了插件的体验！

Fixed an issue that may cause slow startup in Obsidian, from [issue #3](https://github.com/Saktawdi/obsidian-last-position/issues/3)

Thanks to all users who provided feedback for helping us improve the plugin experience!

releases.author: Saktawdi
releases.description:
feat(data): 新增数据管理功能
- 新增数据最后访问字段
- 实现数据列表排序和分页功能
- 新增自动清理过期数据的设置
- 新增数据导入和导出功能

feat(data): add last access field for data
- implement data list sorting and pagination features
- add data management settings for auto-cleanup of expired data
- add data import/export functionality


>[!TIP]
>新版本可能会遇到BUG，如遇到请将复现步骤等信息提交到Issues
>There may be bugs in the new version, if so, please submit the information such as the reproduction steps to Issues,.

releases.author: Saktawdi
releases.description:
feat: 重构项目目录结构并提升用户体验
- 重构项目目录结构，优化代码组织
- 增强用户体验，新增保存动态显示效果
- 修复并优化重试策略，提升系统健壮性

>en：
>feat: Refactor project directory structure and improve user experience
>- Refactor project directory structure for better code organization
>- Enhance user experience by adding dynamic display effects for save operations
>- Fix and improve retry strategy to enhance system robustness
